headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Amazon Prime Day offers significant discounts on Apple products. The Apple Watch Series 11 has dropped to a new low price. AirPods Pro 3 are also discounted to $179.

headline: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
summary: Android 17 is introducing a dedicated gaming mode for foldable phones. This mode will feature a virtual gamepad with touch controls. It aims to enhance the gaming experience on flippy phones.

headline: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
summary: YouTube Shorts is adding new TikTok-like features. A 'clear screen' mode will remove icons and text from videos. The 'thumbs-up' button is being replaced with a 'heart' icon.

headline: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
summary: OpenAI is delaying the full release of its GPT-5.6 model. This delay follows a request from the Trump administration due to security concerns. GPT-5.6 will initially be released in a limited preview form.

headline: Amazon's Box Set Deals Are a Fantasy Book Collection Just Waiting to Happen
summary: Amazon Prime Day features enticing deals on fantasy book box sets. This offers a great opportunity for book collectors. Shoppers can find comprehensive fantasy collections at discounted prices.

headline: Amazon Has a Kingdom Hearts Keyblade at Its Lowest Price in 2026
summary: A Kingdom Hearts Keyblade replica is available on Amazon at its lowest price. This deal is part of Prime Day 2026. Fans can acquire this collectible at a significant discount.

headline: The Nintendo Switch 2 Gaming Console Is Going for as Low as $399 for Prime Day
summary: The Nintendo Switch 2 console is currently discounted to $399 for Prime Day. This represents a new low price for the gaming system. The deal is for a brand-new console.

headline: Save $2,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Gaming PC With GeForce RTX 5090 GPU, 64GB of RAM, and a 4TB SSD
summary: An Alienware Area-51 gaming PC is available with a $2,500 discount. It boasts a GeForce RTX 5090 GPU, 64GB of RAM, and a 4TB SSD. Despite the significant saving, the PC remains an expensive purchase.

headline: King Charles reveals he paid £12.9m in tax for 2024-25
summary: King Charles disclosed he paid £12.9 million in tax for 2024-25. He is the first monarch to publish his tax payments. This figure places him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

headline: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will continue to reside in Clarence House. They will not move into Buckingham Palace after renovations are complete. Buckingham Palace confirmed their decision.

headline: UK braced for hottest June night after 36.7C reached on warmest day of year
summary: The UK recorded its warmest day of the year, with temperatures hitting 36.7C in Somerset. This also marks the hottest June day on record. The country is now preparing for its hottest June night.

headline: France warns even young people's health at risk as Europe's heatwave shifts east
summary: France warns that young people's health is at risk from the ongoing heatwave. Deaths linked to heat are now being observed among younger demographics. The heatwave is shifting east, with Germany potentially reaching 40C.
